news.t: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Launches GPZ ETF, the First to Provide Targeted Exposure to Alternative Asset Managers

holdings.infoBox: GPZ is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Blackstone stock at 12.43%, Brookfield at 12.32%, KKR & Co. at 10.27%, Apollo Global Management at 9.26%, and Brookfield Asset Management at 6.79%.

overview.description: The VanEck Alternative Asset Manager ETF (GPZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies from developed markets involved in the alternative asset management industry, including private equity and BDCs. GPZ was launched on Apr 29, 2025 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Launches GPZ ETF, the First to Provide Targeted Exposure to Alternative Asset Managers
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches GPZ, providing access to leading names in private equity, VC, private credit, more, including Blackstone, Brookfield, KKR and Apollo.
